vulnerability.title: Ensure nss-tools is installed
vulnerability.description: The nss-tools package can be installed with the following command: $ sudo dnf install nss-tools
vulnerability.recommendation: Remediation script: if ! rpm -q --quiet "nss-tools" ; then dnf install -y "nss-tools" fi

triage_decision.reason: Installing nss-tools is a standard package installation that does not affect authentication, authorization, networking, or filesystems. The package provides cryptographic tools and is safe to install without risk of system lockout or service disruption.
